parameters.query:
INSERT INTO auxiliary."serviceNFReport" (
  "RPS", "Chave", "Cliente", "CNPJ", "ValorServicos", 
  "ValorDeducoes", "Aliquota", "ValorISS", "ValorCOFINS",
  "ValorPIS", "ValorCSLL", "ValorIR", "ValorINSS",
  "Descricao", "DataEmissao", "Situacao", 
  "created_at", "updated_at"
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.numero_nf }}',
  '{{ $json.chave_nf }}',
  '{{ $json.razao_social_tomador }}',
  '{{ $json.cnpj_tomador }}',
  {{ $json.valor_servico }},
  {{ $json.valor_deducoes }},
  {{ $json.aliquota_iss }},
  {{ $json.valor_iss }},
  {{ $json.valor_cofins }},
  {{ $json.valor_pis }},
  {{ $json.valor_csll }},
  {{ $json.valor_ir }},
  {{ $json.valor_inss }},
  '{{ $json.discriminacao_servico }}',
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.data_emissao }}' = 'NULL_VALUE' THEN NULL ELSE '{{ $json.data_emissao }}' END,
  '{{ $json.situacao }}',
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT ("RPS")
DO UPDATE SET 
  "Chave" = EXCLUDED."Chave",
  "Cliente" = EXCLUDED."Cliente",
  "CNPJ" = EXCLUDED."CNPJ",
  "ValorServicos" = EXCLUDED."ValorServicos",
  "ValorDeducoes" = EXCLUDED."ValorDeducoes",
  "Aliquota" = EXCLUDED."Aliquota",
  "ValorISS" = EXCLUDED."ValorISS",
  "ValorCOFINS" = EXCLUDED."ValorCOFINS",
  "ValorPIS" = EXCLUDED."ValorPIS",
  "ValorCSLL" = EXCLUDED."ValorCSLL",
  "ValorIR" = EXCLUDED."ValorIR",
  "ValorINSS" = EXCLUDED."ValorINSS",
  "Descricao" = EXCLUDED."Descricao",
  "DataEmissao" = EXCLUDED."DataEmissao",
  "Situacao" = EXCLUDED."Situacao",
  "updated_at" = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE 
  "serviceNFReport"."Chave" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."Chave"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."Cliente" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."Cliente"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."CNPJ" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."CNPJ"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorServicos" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorServicos"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorDeducoes" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorDeducoes"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorISS" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorISS"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorCOFINS" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorCOFINS"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorPIS" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorPIS"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorCSLL" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorCSLL"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorIR" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorIR"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."ValorINSS" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorINSS"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."Descricao" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."Descricao"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."DataEmissao" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."DataEmissao"
  OR "serviceNFReport"."Situacao" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."Situacao"
RETURNING "RPS", "Chave", "ValorServicos", "Situacao";
